				var mi_track_user = true;
				var mi_no_track_reason = '';

								if ( typeof MonsterInsightsPrivacyGuardFilter === 'function' ) {
					var MonsterInsightsLocations = (typeof MonsterInsightsExcludeQuery === 'object') ? MonsterInsightsPrivacyGuardFilter( MonsterInsightsExcludeQuery ) : MonsterInsightsPrivacyGuardFilter( MonsterInsightsDefaultLocations );
				} else {
					var MonsterInsightsLocations = (typeof MonsterInsightsExcludeQuery === 'object') ? MonsterInsightsExcludeQuery : MonsterInsightsDefaultLocations;
				}

								var disableStrs = [
										'ga-disable-G-ZYJ8VP67CR',
									];

				/* Function to detect opted out users */
				function __gtagTrackerIsOptedOut() {
					for (var index = 0; index < disableStrs.length; index++) {
						if (document.cookie.indexOf(disableStrs[index] + '=true') > -1) {
							return true;
						}
					}

					return false;
				}

				/* Disable tracking if the opt-out cookie exists. */
				if (__gtagTrackerIsOptedOut()) {
					for (var index = 0; index < disableStrs.length; index++) {
						window[disableStrs[index]] = true;
					}
				}

				/* Opt-out function */
				function __gtagTrackerOptout() {
					for (var index = 0; index < disableStrs.length; index++) {
						document.cookie = disableStrs[index] + '=true; expires=Thu, 31 Dec 2099 23:59:59 UTC; path=/';
						window[disableStrs[index]] = true;
					}
				}

				if ('undefined' === typeof gaOptout) {
					function gaOptout() {
						__gtagTrackerOptout();
					}
				}
								window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

				window.MonsterInsightsDualTracker = {
					helpers: {},
					trackers: {},
				};
				if (mi_track_user) {
					function __gtagDataLayer() {
						dataLayer.push(arguments);
					}

					function __gtagTracker(type, name, parameters) {
						if (!parameters) {
							parameters = {};
						}

						if (parameters.send_to) {
							__gtagDataLayer.apply(null, arguments);
							return;
						}

						if (type === 'event') {
														parameters.send_to = monsterinsights_frontend.v4_id;
							var hookName = name;
							if (typeof parameters['event_category'] !== 'undefined') {
								hookName = parameters['event_category'] + ':' + name;
							}

							if (typeof MonsterInsightsDualTracker.trackers[hookName] !== 'undefined') {
								MonsterInsightsDualTracker.trackers[hookName](parameters);
							} else {
								__gtagDataLayer('event', name, parameters);
							}
							
						} else {
							__gtagDataLayer.apply(null, arguments);
						}
					}

					__gtagTracker('js', new Date());
					__gtagTracker('set', {
						'developer_id.dZGIzZG': true,
											});
					if ( MonsterInsightsLocations.page_location ) {
						__gtagTracker('set', MonsterInsightsLocations);
					}
										__gtagTracker('config', 'G-ZYJ8VP67CR', {"forceSSL":"true","link_attribution":"true"} );
										window.gtag = __gtagTracker;										(function () {
						/* https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/collection/analyticsjs/ */
						/* ga and __gaTracker compatibility shim. */
						var noopfn = function () {
							return null;
						};
						var newtracker = function () {
							return new Tracker();
						};
						var Tracker = function () {
							return null;
						};
						var p = Tracker.prototype;
						p.get = noopfn;
						p.set = noopfn;
						p.send = function () {
							var args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
							args.unshift('send');
							__gaTracker.apply(null, args);
						};
						var __gaTracker = function () {
							var len = arguments.length;
							if (len === 0) {
								return;
							}
							var f = arguments[len - 1];
							if (typeof f !== 'object' || f === null || typeof f.hitCallback !== 'function') {
								if ('send' === arguments[0]) {
									var hitConverted, hitObject = false, action;
									if ('event' === arguments[1]) {
										if ('undefined' !== typeof arguments[3]) {
											hitObject = {
												'eventAction': arguments[3],
												'eventCategory': arguments[2],
												'eventLabel': arguments[4],
												'value': arguments[5] ? arguments[5] : 1,
											}
										}
									}
									if ('pageview' === arguments[1]) {
										if ('undefined' !== typeof arguments[2]) {
											hitObject = {
												'eventAction': 'page_view',
												'page_path': arguments[2],
											}
										}
									}
									if (typeof arguments[2] === 'object') {
										hitObject = arguments[2];
									}
									if (typeof arguments[5] === 'object') {
										Object.assign(hitObject, arguments[5]);
									}
									if ('undefined' !== typeof arguments[1].hitType) {
										hitObject = arguments[1];
										if ('pageview' === hitObject.hitType) {
											hitObject.eventAction = 'page_view';
										}
									}
									if (hitObject) {
										action = 'timing' === arguments[1].hitType ? 'timing_complete' : hitObject.eventAction;
										hitConverted = mapArgs(hitObject);
										__gtagTracker('event', action, hitConverted);
									}
								}
								return;
							}

							function mapArgs(args) {
								var arg, hit = {};
								var gaMap = {
									'eventCategory': 'event_category',
									'eventAction': 'event_action',
									'eventLabel': 'event_label',
									'eventValue': 'event_value',
									'nonInteraction': 'non_interaction',
									'timingCategory': 'event_category',
									'timingVar': 'name',
									'timingValue': 'value',
									'timingLabel': 'event_label',
									'page': 'page_path',
									'location': 'page_location',
									'title': 'page_title',
									'referrer' : 'page_referrer',
								};
								for (arg in args) {
																		if (!(!args.hasOwnProperty(arg) || !gaMap.hasOwnProperty(arg))) {
										hit[gaMap[arg]] = args[arg];
									} else {
										hit[arg] = args[arg];
									}
								}
								return hit;
							}

							try {
								f.hitCallback();
							} catch (ex) {
							}
						};
						__gaTracker.create = newtracker;
						__gaTracker.getByName = newtracker;
						__gaTracker.getAll = function () {
							return [];
						};
						__gaTracker.remove = noopfn;
						__gaTracker.loaded = true;
						window['__gaTracker'] = __gaTracker;
					})();
									} else {
										console.log("");
					(function () {
						function __gtagTracker() {
							return null;
						}

						window['__gtagTracker'] = __gtagTracker;
						window['gtag'] = __gtagTracker;
					})();
									}

both}.wp-lightbox-overlay.zoom.active{animation:none;opacity:1;visibility:visible}.wp-lightbox-overlay.zoom.active .lightbox-image-container{animation:lightbox-zoom-in forwards}.wp-lightbox-overlay.zoom.show-closing-animation:not(.active){animation:none}.wp-lightbox-overlay.zoom.show-closing-animation:not(.active) .lightbox-image-container{animation:lightbox-zoom-out .4s}.wp-lightbox-overlay.zoom.show-closing-animation:not(.active) .lightbox-image-container img{animation:none}.wp-lightbox-overlay.zoom.show-closing-animation:not(.active) .scrim{animation:turn-off-visibility .4s forwards}}@keyframes show-content-image{0%{visibility:hidden}99%{visibility:hidden}to{visibility:visible}}@keyframes turn-on-visibility{0%{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}@keyframes turn-off-visibility{0%{opacity:1;visibility:visible}99%{opacity:0;visibility:visible}to{opacity:0;visibility:hidden}}@keyframes lightbox-zoom-in{0%{transform:translate(calc((-100vw + var(--wp--lightbox-scrollbar-width))/2 + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-left-position)),calc(-50vh + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-top-position))) scale(var(--wp--lightbox-scale))}to{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)}}@keyframes lightbox-zoom-out{0%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1);visibility:visible}99%{visibility:visible}to{transform:translate(calc((-100vw + var(--wp--lightbox-scrollbar-width))/2 + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-left-position)),calc(-50vh + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-top-position))) scale(var(--wp--lightbox-scale));visibility:hidden}}
/*# sourceURL=https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-includes/blocks/image/style.min.css */

<article id="post-3123" class="post-3123 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-fall-activities first-post" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/screen-free-fall-activities-for-kids/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Natalia-Oliveira-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="emotionally aware kids" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Natalia-Oliveira-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Natalia-Oliveira-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Natalia-Oliveira-from-Pexels-1.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/fall-activities/" rel="category tag">Fall Activities</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/screen-free-fall-activities-for-kids/" rel="bookmark">Screen-Free Fall Activities for Kids That Don’t Cost a Fortune</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/screen-free-fall-activities-for-kids/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-27T11:25:19-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 27, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-27T11:23:56-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 27, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>Come on now, fall is one of the most gorgeous times of year, but it can be the most expensive time of year too. Pumpkin patches that charge an admission fee, hayrides that are more expensive than dinner out, and apple orchards for which you need a small loan just to take home a bag &hellip; </p>
<div class='heateor_sss_sharing_container heateor_sss_vertical_sharing heateor_sss_bottom_sharing' style='width:44px;left: -10px;top: 100px;-webkit-box-shadow:none;box-shadow:none;' <article id="post-3186" class="post-3186 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-parenting" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/sharenting-and-your-childs-privacy/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Helena-Lopes-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Helena-Lopes-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Helena-Lopes-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Helena-Lopes-from-Pexels-1.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/parenting/" rel="category tag">Parenting</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/sharenting-and-your-childs-privacy/" rel="bookmark">Sharenting and Your Child’s Privacy</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/sharenting-and-your-childs-privacy/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-26T14:20:10-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 26, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-26T14:20:05-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 26, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>Many parents on social media do not think twice about sharing photos and information about their children. Honestly, I’ve probably shared a school milestone and the lead-up to a holiday and first bike ride, etc., of some child more times than I can count. And to be honest, there’s something joyful about sharing these little &hellip; </p>
	</div><!-- .entry-content -->
    	<footer class="entry-footer">
		<a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/sharenting-and-your-childs-privacy/" class="btn-readmore">Continue Reading</a>	</footer><!-- .entry-footer -->
	                </div>
            </div>
        </article><!-- #post-3186 -->

<article id="post-3106" class="post-3106 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-fall-activities category-parenting" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/bring-90s-kid-summer-vibes-to-your-fall/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Scott-Webb-from-Pexels.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="fall bucket list ideas for families" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Scott-Webb-from-Pexels.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Scott-Webb-from-Pexels.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Scott-Webb-from-Pexels.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/fall-activities/" rel="category tag">Fall Activities</a> <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/parenting/" rel="category tag">Parenting</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/bring-90s-kid-summer-vibes-to-your-fall/" rel="bookmark">Bring &#8217;90s Kid Summer Vibes to Your Fall</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/bring-90s-kid-summer-vibes-to-your-fall/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-25T14:08:33-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 25, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-25T14:08:26-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 25, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>Bring &#8217;90s Kid Summer Vibes to Your Fall: How to Play Structured Games with No Rules This Season Remember the &#8217;90s? When summers were about biking before the streetlights went on and making forts with sticks and cardboard, choosing your own adventure on a whim? No schedules, no screens, no nonstop notifications — just wild, &hellip; </p>
	</div><!-- .entry-content -->
    	<footer class="entry-footer">
		<a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/bring-90s-kid-summer-vibes-to-your-fall/" class="btn-readmore">Continue Reading</a>	</footer><!-- .entry-footer -->
	                </div>
            </div>
        </article><!-- #post-3106 -->

<article id="post-1643" class="post-1643 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-parenting" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/how-to-be-a-more-intentional-mom/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/View-more-by-Yan-Krukau-from-Pexels-1.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="more intentional mom de-escalate from toddler tantrum playing in water" decoding="async" loading="lazy" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/parenting/" rel="category tag">Parenting</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/how-to-be-a-more-intentional-mom/" rel="bookmark">How to be a More Intentional Mom</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/how-to-be-a-more-intentional-mom/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-19T11:31:05-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 19, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-19T11:31:00-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 19, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>The Myth of Multitasking Moms Did you know it is possible to slow down and there&#8217;s a way you can become a more intentional mom today. We are a society that worships busyness. If you&#8217;re not balancing a toddler on your hip, responding to emails with your toes, and cooking dinner one-handed, are you even &hellip; </p>
	</div><!-- .entry-content -->
    	<footer class="entry-footer">

<article id="post-3064" class="post-3064 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-pregnancy" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/nest-boosting-instead-of-baby-showers/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Curtis-Adams-from-Pexels.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="nest-boosting" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Curtis-Adams-from-Pexels.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Curtis-Adams-from-Pexels.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Curtis-Adams-from-Pexels.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/pregnancy/" rel="category tag">pregnancy</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/nest-boosting-instead-of-baby-showers/" rel="bookmark">Nest-Boosting Instead of Baby Showers: The Cozy New Trend for Expectant Parents</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/nest-boosting-instead-of-baby-showers/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-18T13:44:54-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 18, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-18T13:44:49-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 18, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>If you’re a parent—or you know one about to welcome a little human—you’ve probably noticed a shift in the baby celebration scene. Forget the pastel balloons, diaper cakes, and “guess the baby food” games. Then came the nest-boosting party: a new, pragmatic, and surprisingly cozy way to support parents-to-be and actually help them prepare for &hellip; </p>

<article id="post-3061" class="post-3061 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-lunch-box-ideas" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/20-fall-lunch-box-ideas-that-kids-love/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Esra-Korkmaz-from-Pexels.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="fall lunch box ideas" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Esra-Korkmaz-from-Pexels.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Esra-Korkmaz-from-Pexels.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Esra-Korkmaz-from-Pexels.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">

        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">

                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/recipes/dinner-recipes/" rel="category tag">Dinner recipes</a> <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/recipes/" rel="category tag">Recipes</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/15-crockpot-dinners-to-throw-together/" rel="bookmark">15 Crockpot Dinners You Can Literally Throw Together</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/15-crockpot-dinners-to-throw-together/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-17T22:34:49-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 17, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-18T09:30:00-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 18, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>Let’s face it: Parenting is a juggling act that sometimes has you wondering how on earth to get dinner on the table and assist with algebra homework, while also doubling as referee at soccer practice. Some days, it’s the only hot meal anyone in your family will eat besides what you inhale in your car &hellip; </p>

<article id="post-3026" class="post-3026 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-fun-snacks category-snack-for-kids" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/25-fall-snacks-you-can-prepare/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Tamara-Velazquez-from-baseimage.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="fall snacks" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Tamara-Velazquez-from-baseimage.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Tamara-Velazquez-from-baseimage.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Tamara-Velazquez-from-baseimage.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/recipes/fun-snacks/" rel="category tag">Fun snacks</a> <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/snack-for-kids/" rel="category tag">Snack for kids</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/25-fall-snacks-you-can-prepare/" rel="bookmark">25 Fall Snacks You Can Prepare for Your Children After School</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/25-fall-snacks-you-can-prepare/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-16T21:49:10-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 16, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-17T12:00:00-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 17, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>Ah, yes, fall. There are the crisp leaves beneath your tennis shoes, cinnamon threads of clothing being pulled out from hibernation; everything sounds and smells exactly like pumpkin spice. But there are limits. We do actually love the season, but the &#8220;I&#8217;m starving,&#8221; whines of children after returning home from school do tend to grate &hellip; </p>

<article id="post-3045" class="post-3045 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-parenting" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fafo-parenting-learning/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-RDNE-Stock-project-from-Pexels-3.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="FAFO Parenting" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-RDNE-Stock-project-from-Pexels-3.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-RDNE-Stock-project-from-Pexels-3.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-RDNE-Stock-project-from-Pexels-3.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/parenting/" rel="category tag">Parenting</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fafo-parenting-learning/" rel="bookmark">FAFO Parenting—Learning Through Consequence</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fafo-parenting-learning/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-16T21:27:25-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 16, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-17T07:00:00-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 17, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>What is &#8220;FAFO&#8221; Parenting? Let&#8217;s be honest for a second: parenting is exhausting. Between the laundry that somehow multiplies overnight, the meals that vanish into little stomachs faster than you can say &#8220;clean your plate,&#8221; and the endless battles over socks and screen time, it can feel like you&#8217;re navigating a maze without a map. &hellip; </p>
	</div><!-- .entry-content -->
    	<footer class="entry-footer">
		<a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fafo-parenting-learning/" class="btn-readmore">Continue Reading</a>	</footer><!-- .entry-footer -->
	                </div>
            </div>
        </article><!-- #post-3045 -->

<article id="post-3029" class="post-3029 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-fall-activities category-parenting" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Blog">
	           <div class="post-content">
                <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fall-bucket-list-ideas-for-families/" class="post-thumbnail"><img width="410" height="350" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Gustavo-Fring-from-Pexels-4.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1" class="attachment-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two size-fashion-lifestyle-blog-home-two wp-post-image" alt="&#039;90s kid summer vibes" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Gustavo-Fring-from-Pexels-4.png?resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 410w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Gustavo-Fring-from-Pexels-4.png?resize=72%2C60&amp;ssl=1 72w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/View-more-by-Gustavo-Fring-from-Pexels-4.png?zoom=2&amp;resize=410%2C350&amp;ssl=1 820w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 410px) 100vw, 410px" /></a>                <div class="text-holder">
                        <header class="entry-header">
		<span class="cat-links" itemprop="about"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/fall-activities/" rel="category tag">Fall Activities</a> <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/category/parenting/" rel="category tag">Parenting</a></span><h2 class="entry-title"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fall-bucket-list-ideas-for-families/" rel="bookmark">100 Cozy, Fall Bucket List Ideas for Families</a></h2><div class="entry-meta"><span class="byline" itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">by <span itemprop="name"><a class="url fn n" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/author/jenna-jury/" itemprop="url">JENNA.JURY</a></span></span><span class="posted-on">updated on  <a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/fall-bucket-list-ideas-for-families/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2025-09-16T18:22:37-04:00" itemprop="dateModified">September 16, 2025</time></time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-09-16T18:22:32-04:00" itemprop="datePublished">September 16, 2025</time></a></span></div>	</header>         
        <div class="entry-content" itemprop="text">
		<p>There’s just something magical about Fall, isn’t there? The air changes just enough to make hot cocoa taste like a snuggle, leaves crunch under little feet, and pumpkin spice jumps in everything from lattes to hand soap (and yes, we love it). Are you looking for cozy fall bucket list ideas for families to try &hellip; </p>
	</div><!-- .entry-content -->

	<nav class="navigation pagination" aria-label="Posts pagination">
		<h2 class="screen-reader-text">Posts pagination</h2>
		<div class="nav-links"><span aria-label="Page 1" aria-current="page" class="page-numbers current"><span class="meta-nav screen-reader-text">Page </span>1</span>
<a aria-label="Page 2" class="page-numbers" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/page/2/"><span class="meta-nav screen-reader-text">Page </span>2</a>
<span class="page-numbers dots">&hellip;</span>
<a aria-label="Page 27" class="page-numbers" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/page/27/"><span class="meta-nav screen-reader-text">Page </span>27</a>
<a class="next page-numbers" href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/page/2/">Next</a></div>
	</nav>        
        
	</div><!-- #primary -->


<aside id="secondary" class="widget-area" itemscope itemtype="http://schema.org/WPSideBar">
	<section id="text-3" class="widget widget_text"><h2 class="widget-title" itemprop="name">Hi there! I&#8217;m Jenna</h2>			<div class="textwidget"><p><!-- wp:group {"className":"nfd-text-balance","layout":{"type":"flex","orientation":"vertical"}} --></p>
<div class="nfd-text-balance wp-block-group"><!-- wp:paragraph {"align":"center"} --></p>
<p class="has-text-align-center">Ever since I became a mom, I have been excited about this parenting gig.</p>
<p><!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph {"align":"center"} --></p>
<p class="has-text-align-center">Throughout my journey as a mom I have learned so much about what works, what doesn&#8217;t. I have been in the trenches and forced to grow as a mom and a person.</p>
<p><!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph {"align":"center"} --></p>
<p class="has-text-align-center">A year and a half ago I graduated with my Master of Arts in Positive Psychology and Life Coaching and man did I learn so much about the foundations of Positive Psychology. I began to ask myself, can positive psychology be used in parenting? The short answer? Of course it can!</p>
<p><!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<p><!-- /wp:group --> <!-- wp:paragraph {"align":"center"} --></p>
<p class="has-text-align-center">I am so excited to work with moms who like me may have found themselves in the trenches but want so much more out of there parenthood than just getting through.</p>
<p><!-- /wp:paragraph --></p>
</div>
		</section><section id="media_image-3" class="widget widget_media_image"><img width="231" height="300" src="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/428602789_2191032171100434_8608496659809665797_n.jpg?fit=231%2C300&amp;ssl=1" class="image wp-image-28  attachment-medium size-medium" alt="" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto;" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/428602789_2191032171100434_8608496659809665797_n.jpg?w=637&amp;ssl=1 637w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/428602789_2191032171100434_8608496659809665797_n.jpg?resize=231%2C300&amp;ssl=1 231w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 231px) 100vw, 231px" /></section><section id="block-12" class="widget widget_block widget_media_image">
<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="384" height="217" src="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/IAPPC-LOGO-Member.jpg" alt="" class="wp-image-365" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/IAPPC-LOGO-Member.jpg?w=384&amp;ssl=1 384w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/IAPPC-LOGO-Member.jpg?resize=300%2C170&amp;ssl=1 300w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 384px) 100vw, 384px" /></figure>
</section><section id="block-7" class="widget widget_block widget_search"><form role="search" method="get" action="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/" class="wp-block-search__button-outside wp-block-search__text-button wp-block-search"    ><label class="wp-block-search__label" for="wp-block-search__input-1" >Search</label><div class="wp-block-search__inside-wrapper" ><input class="wp-block-search__input" id="wp-block-search__input-1" placeholder="" value="" type="search" name="s" required /><button aria-label="Search" class="wp-block-search__button wp-element-button" type="submit" >Search</button></div></form></section><section id="block-9" class="widget widget_block">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Visit the Peaceful Nest Blog Store and Check Out My Latest Products</h2>
</section><section id="block-10" class="widget widget_block widget_media_image">
<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/shop/"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="940" height="788" src="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Mindfulness-Journal.png" alt="" class="wp-image-305" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Mindfulness-Journal.png?w=940&amp;ssl=1 940w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Mindfulness-Journal.png?resize=300%2C251&amp;ssl=1 300w, https://i0.wp.com/thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Mindfulness-Journal.png?resize=768%2C644&amp;ssl=1 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 940px) 100vw, 940px" /></a></figure>
</section><section id="monsterinsights-popular-posts-widget-2" class="widget monsterinsights-popular-posts-widget"><div class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-alpha monsterinsights-popular-posts-styled monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-columns-1"><ul class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-list"><li ><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/sweet-summer-traditions/"><div class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-text"><span class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-title" >Sweet Summer Traditions: 30 Simple Ways to Make This Summer One to Remember (Without Spending a Fortune)</span></div></a></li><li ><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/5-ways-to-raise-helpful-children/"><div class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-text"><span class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-title" >5 Ways to Raise Helpful Children</span></div></a></li><li ><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/free-letter-d-coloring-page-printable/"><div class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-text"><span class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-title" >Free Letter D Coloring Page Printable</span></div></a></li><li ><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/10-fun-first-day-of-homeschool-traditions-to-start-this-year/"><div class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-text"><span class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-title" >10 Fun First Day Of Homeschool Traditions to Start This Year!</span></div></a></li><li ><a href="https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/snake-paper-plate-craft/"><div class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-text"><span class="monsterinsights-widget-popular-posts-title" >Snake Paper Plate Craft</span></div></a></li></ul></div><p></p></section><section id="block-8" class="widget widget_block widget_text">

        </div><!-- .container/ -->

e)a.supports[n]=e[n],a.supports.everything=a.supports.everything&&a.supports[n],"flag"!==n&&(a.supports.everythingExceptFlag=a.supports.everythingExceptFlag&&a.supports[n]);var t;a.supports.everythingExceptFlag=a.supports.everythingExceptFlag&&!a.supports.flag,a.supports.everything||((t=a.source||{}).concatemoji?r(t.concatemoji):t.wpemoji&&t.twemoji&&(r(t.twemoji),r(t.wpemoji)))});
//# sourceURL=https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-includes/js/wp-emoji-loader.min.js
/* ]]> */
</script>
		<script type="text/javascript">
			(function() {
				window.wcAnalytics = window.wcAnalytics || {};
				const wcAnalytics = window.wcAnalytics;

				// Set the assets URL for webpack to find the split assets.
				wcAnalytics.assets_url = 'https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-content/plugins/jetpack/jetpack_vendor/automattic/woocommerce-analytics/src/../build/';

				// Set the REST API tracking endpoint URL.
				wcAnalytics.trackEndpoint = 'https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/wp-json/woocommerce-analytics/v1/track';

				// Set common properties for all events.
				wcAnalytics.commonProps = {"session_id":null,"landing_page":null,"is_engaged":null,"ui":0,"blog_id":157488773,"store_id":"532ab926-adb5-474b-89ce-8df77bd1640c","url":"https://thepeacefulnestblog.com","woo_version":"10.5.3","wp_version":"6.9.1","store_admin":0,"device":"desktop","store_currency":"USD","timezone":"America/Indiana/Indianapolis","is_guest":1,"_via_ua":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/132.0.6823.76 Safari/537.36","_via_ip":"223.205.81.26","_lg":"","_dr":"https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/app-ads.txt","_dl":"https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/","_via_ref":"https://thepeacefulnestblog.com/app-ads.txt"};

				// Set the event queue.
				wcAnalytics.eventQueue = [];

				// Features.
				wcAnalytics.features = {
					ch: false,
					sessionTracking: false,
					proxy: false,
				};

				wcAnalytics.breadcrumbs = ["Home"];

				// Page context flags.
				wcAnalytics.pages = {
					isAccountPage: false,
					isCart: false,
				};
			})();
		</script>
		
</body>
</html>
